title: Add cgroup_manager option for REST API
body:
### Feature request description

Podman CLI supports the flag `--cgroup-manager` that allows for setting `cgroup-parent` to a normal cgroup path. Meanwhile, the create/run REST API does not support this option.

### Suggest potential solution

Add `cgroup_manager` option to the create/run REST API.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

I don't find any alternatives other than setting the cgroup_manager system-wide, which is bad.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body: We're not currently wired to allow multiple cgroup managers under the same `podman system service` process - right now, the cgroup manager is set once per Podman process (which wasn't a problem until we added an HTTP server). Wouldn't be a large amount of work to change but would significantly increase the scope of work for this.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
